mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ar_report (enterprise_id, audit_year, report_name, report_type, status, generated_file_path, generate_time, uploaded_file_path, uploaded_file_data, uploaded_file_size, uploaded_file_name, uploaded_at, report_html, template_id, submission_id, flow_chart_path, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{enterpriseId}, #{auditYear}, #{reportName}, #{reportType}, #{status}, #{generatedFilePath}, #{generateTime}, #{uploadedFilePath}, #{uploadedFileData}, #{uploadedFileSize}, #{uploadedFileName}, #{uploadedAt}, #{reportHtml}, #{templateId}, #{submissionId}, #{flowChartPath}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE ar_report
report_name = #{reportName}, status = #{status}, generated_file_path = #{generatedFilePath}, uploaded_file_path = #{uploadedFilePath}, uploaded_file_data = #{uploadedFileData}, uploaded_file_size = #{uploadedFileSize}, uploaded_file_name = #{uploadedFileName}, uploaded_at = #{uploadedAt}, generate_time = #{generateTime}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, report_html = #{reportHtml}, template_id = #{templateId}, submission_id = #{submissionId}, flow_chart_path = #{flowChartPath}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.enterprise_id, r.audit_year, r.report_name, r.report_type, r.status, r.generated_file_path, r.uploaded_file_path, r.uploaded_file_size, r.uploaded_file_name, r.uploaded_at, r.onlyoffice_doc_key, r.generate_time, r.submit_time, r.report_html, r.template_id, r.submission_id, r.flow_chart_path, r.review_comment, r.reviewer_id, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.deleted, e.enterprise_name FROM ar_report r LEFT JOIN ent_enterprise e ON e.id = r.enterprise_id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT uploaded_file_data FROM ar_report WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, enterprise_id, audit_year, report_name, report_type, status, generated_file_path, uploaded_file_path, uploaded_file_size, uploaded_file_name, uploaded_at, generate_time, submit_time, template_id, submission_id, flow_chart_path, review_comment, reviewer_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM ar_report WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND audit_year = #{auditYear} AND report_type = #{reportType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1
